title: The Course Toward Alabasta
description: On pages 17–18, the course toward alabasta as the crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is.
scene: The Course Toward Alabasta. The crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What is it? If it's about help, then I don't need it.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or do you owe that woman something as well?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Q: A cat... That's a cat...? So, why did I create it? When I read the manga graphic novels years ago, a lot of authors used to put this sort of thing in their books. Because I enjoyed them so much, I decided that if I was a manga artist, I would put
